description: You are a VFX Matchmove Artist. Using the 40-frame drone flyover sequence located in '/home/ga/footage/', track the camera motion and solve the 3D camera trajectory. Ensure at least 15 features are tracked throughout the shot with a final solve error of less than 1.0 pixel. Apply the tracking solution to the scene camera and save the project to '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/tracking_solved.blend'.
